resources.string:
AI-native Android automation platform. Enables AI agents to control your device through the MCP protocol with sub-100ms latency.

This service:
• Observes UI elements across all apps
• Performs gestures and touch interactions
• Captures screenshots
• Manages app lifecycle
• Provides real-time UI state to connected AI agents

Designed for development, testing, and AI-assisted automation workflows.
1. Enable AccessibilityService in Settings → Accessibility → NeuralBridge
2. Grant "Allow restricted settings" permission in Settings → Apps → NeuralBridge → Advanced
3. Enable Notification access in Settings → Notifications → Notification access → NeuralBridge
5. Add MCP config to your AI agent
